originalTitle: Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer LEAK Explained | Sneak Peek
content: HOW, exactly, do Spider-Man trailers leak? We brought in an expert to explain! The Spider-Man Brand New Day trailer leaked in the past week, ahead of it’s planned release on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. In this episode of The Sneak Peek on New Rockstars, hosts Erik Voss and Jessica Clemons bring on a past assistant editor at trailer editing companies, Abby Freel, to explain the inside process of how big movie trailers are edited, how many people are involved, and why this happens to Sony for the Spider-Man Brand New Day second trailer, and not for the highly anticipated Avengers Doomsday trailer from Marvel Studios / Disney! NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK youtube.com/@WitchingHourNR youtube.com/@BreakroomNR youtube.com/@DeepDiveNR youtube.com/@HighlightsNR Join the NR Underground for exclusive audio shows: https://nrunderground.supercast.com Check out our merch! http://www.NerdRiot.shop Follow us on Spotify to get updates when we release new music: https://open.spotify.com/artist/00FXqz5AkEpUTJ1aAPj0TA CHAPTERS 00:00 - Intro 02:19 - How Do Trailer Houses Work? 10:34 - Why Isn't Sony's Security On Top of it? 16:47 - Trailer Houses Continued 31:43 - Coming up on NRS 33:05 - What We're Watching! EXECUTIVE PRODUCERS Michael Horwitz TDS on a Quest Dante Justin Schoenrock Bro... Paulo Bianca Rick Denmon Jeremy Dunham Frederick Price This video was edited using the Adobe Creative Suite. chineseSummary: 新摇滚明星 · 40,094 次观看
chineseContent: 蜘蛛侠预告片究竟是如何泄漏的？我们请了专家来解释！ 《蜘蛛侠全新日》预告片在计划于 2026 年 6 月 17 日星期三发布之前已于上周泄露。在《新摇滚明星先睹为快》的这一集中，主持人埃里克·沃斯和杰西卡·克莱蒙斯请来了预告片编辑公司的前助理编辑艾比·弗里尔，解释大型电影预告片的剪辑过程、涉及多少人，以及为什么索尼在《蜘蛛侠全新日》第二部预告片中会发生这种情况，而不是漫威影业/迪士尼备受期待的《复仇者联盟末日》预告片！新的 ROCKSTARS 网络 youtube.com/@WitchingHourNR youtube.com/@BreakroomNR youtube.com/@DeepDiveNR youtube.com/@HighlightsNR 加入 NR Underground 观看独家音频节目：https://nrunderground.supercast.com 查看我们的商品！ http://www.NerdRiot.shop 在 Spotify 上关注我们，以便在我们发布新音乐时获取更新：https://open.spotify.com/artist/00FXqz5AkEpUTJ1aAPj0TA 章节 00:00 - 简介 02:19 - 拖车房如何工作？ 10:34 - 为什么索尼的安全性不放在首位？ 16:47 - 拖车房继续 31:43 - NRS 即将推出 33:05 - 我们在看什么！执行制片人 Michael Horwitz TDS on a Quest Dante Justin Schoenrock Bro...
